channel.title: Daily Cybersecurity Threat Bulletin
channel.description: Your comprehensive daily cybersecurity intelligence briefing covering the latest threats, vulnerabilities, and incidents. Multiple daily cybersecurity bulletins are available on demand at QuantitativeGenius.com.
channel.itunes:author: Quantitative Genius
channel.itunes:summary: Your comprehensive daily cybersecurity intelligence briefing covering the latest threats, vulnerabilities, and incidents. Multiple daily cybersecurity bulletins are available on demand at QuantitativeGenius.com.

item.title: Daily Cybersecurity Threat Bulletin — March 30, 2026 (6:00 AM PDT)
item.description: Threat Level: 74% (High/Orange), up from 72 percent. Virtual phone bank bypass, Citrix NetScaler recon, nation-state attacks doubled, Oracle Fusion RCE, Venom Stealer, Wing FTP deadline. Multiple daily cybersecurity bulletins are available on demand at QuantitativeGenius.com.
item.itunes:summary: Threat Level: 74% (High/Orange), up from 72 percent. Virtual phone bank bypass, Citrix NetScaler recon, nation-state attacks doubled, Oracle Fusion RCE, Venom Stealer, Wing FTP deadline.
